finding: C. Decreased cardiac perfusion other than myocardial infarction

differentials.name: Coronary artery spasm: severe unstable angina may cause defect after stress + on redistribution images, but will be normal at rest!
differentials.raw: Coronary artery spasm: severe unstable angina may cause defect after stress + on redistribution images, but will be normal at rest!

differentials.name: Attenuation by diaphragm, breast, implant, pacemaker mnemonic:   I'M SIC
differentials.raw: Attenuation by diaphragm, breast, implant, pacemaker mnemonic:   I'M SIC

differentials.name: Myocardial infarct without coronary artery disease
differentials.raw: Myocardial infarct without coronary artery disease

differentials.name: Under influence of beta-blocker: eg, propranolol
differentials.raw: Under influence of beta-blocker: eg, propranolol

differentials.name: Low energy x-rays result in poor resolution → improved with SPECT
differentials.raw: Low energy x-rays result in poor resolution → improved with SPECT

differentials.name: Dose is limited by its long half-life
differentials.raw: Dose is limited by its long half-life

differentials.name: Half-value thickness of 3 cm results in less avid appearing myocardium: inferior wall
differentials.raw: Half-value thickness of 3 cm results in less avid appearing myocardium: inferior wall (deeper part of myocardium) / anterolateral wall (overlain by breast)

differentials.name: Imaging must be completed by 45 minutes post injection or redistribution occurs 99mTc-MIBI (Sestamibi) =  cationic lipophilic isonitrile complex, which binds to myocyte intramitochondrial proteins
differentials.raw: Imaging must be completed by 45 minutes post injection or redistribution occurs 99mTc-MIBI (Sestamibi) =  cationic lipophilic isonitrile complex, which binds to myocyte intramitochondrial proteins

differentials.name: Low radiation dose ← shorter half-life allowing larger doses with less patient radiation
differentials.raw: Low radiation dose ← shorter half-life allowing larger doses with less patient radiation

differentials.name: Excellent imaging characteristics due to (a)  improved photon flux → faster imaging + ability for cardiac gating (b)  higher photon energy → less attenuation artifact from breast tissue / diaphragm + less scatter
differentials.raw: Excellent imaging characteristics due to (a)  improved photon flux → faster imaging + ability for cardiac gating (b)  higher photon energy → less attenuation artifact from breast tissue / diaphragm + less scatter

differentials.name: Temporal separation of injection and imaging allows injection during acute myocardial infarct when patient may not be stable for imaging; after stabilization + intervention (angioplasty / urokinase) imaging can demonstrate the pre-intervention defect
differentials.raw: Temporal separation of injection and imaging allows injection during acute myocardial infarct when patient may not be stable for imaging; after stabilization + intervention (angioplasty / urokinase) imaging can demonstrate the pre-intervention defect

differentials.name: Improved accuracy ← increased specificity + marginally improved sensitivity
differentials.raw: Improved accuracy ← increased specificity + marginally improved sensitivity

differentials.raw: Capacity to quantify left ventricular function at rest + during peak stress and coronary flow reserve

differentials.name: attainment of 85% of predicted maximal heart rate = 220 - age in years
differentials.raw: attainment of 85% of predicted maximal heart rate = 220 - age in years

differentials.raw: Fall in BP > 10 mmHg below previous stage

differentials.raw: Run of 3 successive premature ventricular beats ◊  Cardiologist with crash cart should be available!

differentials.raw: Sensitivity to detect ischemic lesions decreases with suboptimal exercise (in particular for older population)

differentials.raw: Higher false-positive tests in women (artifacts from overlying breast tissue)

differentials.name: Propranolol (beta blocker) interferes with stress test, should be discontinued 24-48 hr prior to testing
differentials.raw: Propranolol (beta blocker) interferes with stress test, should be discontinued 24-48 hr prior to testing

differentials.name: Freedom from patient infirmities: eg, severe peripheral vascular disease, arthritis, pain
differentials.raw: Freedom from patient infirmities: eg, severe peripheral vascular disease, arthritis, pain

differentials.name: IV infusion of 140 µg/kg/min dipyridamole (= Persantine®) → 3-5-fold increase in coronary artery blood flow
differentials.raw: IV infusion of 140 µg/kg/min dipyridamole (= Persantine®) → 3-5-fold increase in coronary artery blood flow

differentials.name: IV infusion of 140 µg/kg/min adenosine
differentials.raw: IV infusion of 140 µg/kg/min adenosine (= Adenocard®, Adenoscan®)

differentials.name: IV injection of 0.4 mg Regadenoson (Lexiscan®) followed by saline flush = highly specific adenosine A2A receptor agonist acting as coronary vasodilator with very low affinity for A1 (→ AV node block), A2B (→ severe peripheral vasodilation and hypotension), A3 (→ bronchoconstriction) Advantages:   weight-unadjusted single bolus dose, fast onset + short duration of action, fewer side effects than adenosine »  radiotracer injection 10-20 sec after saline flush »  150 mg of IV aminophylline > 3-4 minutes after radiotracer injection »  complete limited exercise protocol tailored to patient's physical ability
differentials.raw: IV injection of 0.4 mg Regadenoson (Lexiscan®) followed by saline flush = highly specific adenosine A2A receptor agonist acting as coronary vasodilator with very low affinity for A1 (→ AV node block), A2B (→ severe peripheral vasodilation and hypotension), A3 (→ bronchoconstriction) Advantages:   weight-unadjusted single bolus dose, fast onset + short duration of action, fewer side effects than adenosine »  radiotracer injection 10-20 sec after saline flush »  150 mg of IV aminophylline > 3-4 minutes after radiotracer injection »  complete limited exercise protocol tailored to patient's physical ability

differentials.name: IV infusion of 5 µg/kg/min dobutamine for 5 minutes, increased in steps of 5 µg/kg every 5 minutes to a maximum infusion rate of 30-40 µg/kg/min titrated to patient's response »  radiotracer injected at onset of significant symptoms / ECG changes / achievement of maximal rate of infusion or heart rate »  infusion maintained for an additional 2 minutes with dose adjusted to patient's condition
differentials.raw: IV infusion of 5 µg/kg/min dobutamine for 5 minutes, increased in steps of 5 µg/kg every 5 minutes to a maximum infusion rate of 30-40 µg/kg/min titrated to patient's response »  radiotracer injected at onset of significant symptoms / ECG changes / achievement of maximal rate of infusion or heart rate »  infusion maintained for an additional 2 minutes with dose adjusted to patient's condition

context: False-negative thallium test: Advantages compared with 99mTc compounds: Disadvantages: Pharmacokinetics: ›  relatively rapid clearance from circulation (40% first- pass extraction) ← passive diffusion across cell membranes ›  high myocardial accumulation (4%) with nonlinear uptake proportional to regional perfusion (fall-off in extraction at higher rates of flow) ›  slow washout with long retention time in myocardium and little recirculation ›  significant hepatic + gallbladder activity Excretion:   through biliary tree (give milk after injection and before imaging to decrease GB activity) Dos
